moments.title: World Cup Final Showdown!
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 culminates this Sunday with a highly anticipated final between Spain and Argentina in New York.

angles.name: Match Build-up
angles.copy: It all comes down to this! Spain vs. Argentina for the FIFA World Cup trophy on Sunday. Who are you backing to lift the cup? #WorldCup2026

angles.name: Fan Excitement
angles.copy: Only two days until the biggest game in football! The World Cup final is set for Sunday – get ready for a nail-biting clash!

angles.name: Team Focus
angles.copy: Spain's flair meets Argentina's grit in Sunday's World Cup final. Will Messi add another star, or will Spain claim their second title?

moments.title: Summer Holidays Begin!
moments.blurb: Schools across England and Wales are breaking up this week, marking the official start of the long summer holidays for many families.

angles.name: Holiday Kick-off
angles.copy: SCHOOL'S OUT FOR SUMMER! ☀️ The long-awaited summer holidays are officially underway for many across the UK. What are your big plans?

angles.name: Travel Buzz
angles.copy: The great summer getaway is HERE! Roads, rails, and airports are set to be busy as families head off on their adventures. Where are you off to?

moments.title: New Official Singles Chart
moments.blurb: The brand new UK Official Singles Chart is out today, revealing the nation's biggest tracks and a potential new No.1.

angles.name: Chart Friday
angles.copy: It's Chart Friday! The Official Singles Chart has just dropped. Who's gone to No.1 this week? Tune in to find out! #OfficialCharts

angles.name: New Music Focus
angles.copy: A new week, a new chart! Is your favourite track climbing the ranks or has a fresh hit soared to the top spot? Let us know what you're listening to!

moments.title: Latitude Festival Returns
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival celebrates its 20th anniversary next week, bringing music, comedy, and arts to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26.

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: Only a week until Latitude Festival kicks off its 20th anniversary celebrations in Suffolk! Who's ready for four days of incredible music and arts?

angles.name: Lineup Hype
angles.copy: David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi are headlining Latitude 2026! Plus loads more music, comedy & theatre. Who are you excited to see?

moments.title: Love Island Finale Approaches
moments.blurb: The latest series of Love Island UK is entering its final stages, with the grand finale expected next week as couples battle for the prize.

angles.name: Love Island Buzz
angles.copy: The Love Island villa drama is heating up as the final looms! Who do you think will be crowned the winning couple this year?

angles.name: Finale Predictions
angles.copy: With the Love Island final just around the corner, which couple has stolen your heart and deserves to win? Get your votes ready!

moments.title: Happy 49th, Luke Bryan!
moments.blurb: American country superstar Luke Bryan celebrates his 49th birthday today, July 17.

angles.name: Country Star Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 49th birthday to the one and only country icon, Luke Bryan! What's your favourite Luke Bryan track?

moments.title: Happy 51st, M.I.A.!
moments.blurb: British rapper, singer, and activist M.I.A. turns 51 tomorrow, July 18.

angles.name: M.I.A. Celebration
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're celebrating the incredible M.I.A. as she turns 51! Get ready to move to her iconic beats. #MIA

moments.title: Happy 55th, Ricky Martin!
moments.blurb: The King of Latin Pop, Ricky Martin, celebrates his 55th birthday tomorrow, July 18.

angles.name: Latin Pop Legend
angles.copy: Livin' La Vida Loca! Wishing a very happy 55th birthday to the one and only Ricky Martin tomorrow! What's your favourite hit?

moments.title: Happy 79th, Brian May!
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday this Sunday, July 19.

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Queen guitarist, Sir Brian May, this Sunday! What's your favourite May guitar solo?

moments.title: Happy 79th, Carlos Santana!
moments.blurb: The legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for his fusion of rock and Latin American jazz, turns 79 on Monday, July 20.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the incredible Carlos Santana on Monday! Which Santana track gets you grooving?

moments.title: Happy 34th, Selena Gomez!
moments.blurb: Actress and pop superstar Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday on Wednesday, July 22.

angles.name: Pop Star Celebration
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate Selena Gomez's 34th birthday this Wednesday! What's your all-time favourite Selena hit?

moments.title: Happy 61st, Slash!
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses' iconic lead guitarist, Slash, celebrates his 61st birthday next Thursday, July 23.

angles.name: Rock Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Next Thursday, we're saluting the guitar hero, Slash, as he turns 61! What's your most memorable Guns N' Roses riff?

moments.title: Happy 57th, Jennifer Lopez!
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday next Friday, July 24.

angles.name: J.Lo's Birthday Bash
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate the incredible Jennifer Lopez's 57th birthday next Friday! What's your favourite J.Lo anthem?
